Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Vacated

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-17-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Benjamin Winslow, Esq. for Petitioner: Noel Walker present as guardian ad litem for Kyrie McClellan, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical expenses of $59,110.33
Attorney's fees: $106,368.91
Costs $22,861.35
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of 153,659.41, shall be used to fun a structured settlement for the benefit of the minor, Kyrie McClellan, details in Exh. "A".
Counsel to prepare Order.

May 17, 2004
Order received in court and singed by Comm. Kaplan.
